name: Power Unit
helpText: Unit displayed on the Y-axis and in tooltips (e.g. kW, MW).

name: Potential Power Label
helpText: Legend label for the theoretical potential power curve.

name: Exported Power Label
helpText: Legend label for the actual exported power area.

name: Curtailment Label
helpText: Label shown inside the curtailment (red) zone on the chart.

name: Actual Power Telemetry Keys
helpText: Comma-separated time-series telemetry keys for real exported power. Evaluated in order for fallback.

name: Setpoint Telemetry Keys
helpText: Comma-separated telemetry keys representing the maximum allowed percentage (%) of plant capacity. Evaluated in order.

name: Plant Capacity Attribute
helpText: Server attribute key for the plant's total capacity.

name: Capacity Attribute Unit
helpText: Unit of the capacity attribute (MW or kW). Will be converted to the widget's Power Unit if necessary.

name: Error Margin (%)
helpText: Percentage margin of error for the theoretical potential calculation.

name: Potential Profile Attribute Key
helpText: Server attribute key containing a JSON array of 96 values (15-min intervals) representing potential power in the configured unit.

name: Max Plant Power (Simulation)
helpText: Peak nameplate power of the plant in the configured unit. Used for simulation bell-curve generation.

name: Grid Export Limit (Simulation)
helpText: Grid-imposed export ceiling in the configured unit. Creates the flat-top curtailment pattern in simulation mode.

name: Sunrise Hour (Simulation)
helpText: Hour when solar generation begins (0–24). Default 6 = 06:00.

name: Sunset Hour (Simulation)
helpText: Hour when solar generation ends (0–24). Default 18 = 18:00.

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for values in tooltips and labels.

name: Show Curtailment Label on Chart
helpText: Toggle the 'Curtailed Energy' text overlay inside the red zone on the chart.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the card border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Text
helpText: Static tooltip override. Leave blank for auto-generated dynamic tooltip with curtailment summary.
